title: Fix 5 small parsing/guard bug beads under parallel explore+codereview workflow
description: Group 5 distinct small ready bug beads for minimal idiomatic fixes with checks/guards/resets/strict parsing per spec/drafts/test/vectors. Parallel subagents for explore (filename intent/dir/spec/drafts/vectors/adjacent), claim/read/fix per bead. 3 parallel codereview (correctness/security/edge) per bead using beads for findings only. No comments, no test changes, vector-identical. Run pytest/cargo/clippy/fmt/ruff/doctor after each. Close all after clean passes. Beads only, no git.
